description_long: This is a two-story modern suburban house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large rectangular windows, a central arched entryway with double doors, and a single-car garage to the right. A white picket fence encloses a small front yard with a patch of green grass and a paved driveway. The exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light neutral color, with minimal decorative elements. The rear and side facades are simpler, with additional windows and a continuation of the fence and yard.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a central arched entryway, and a single-car garage, surrounded by a white picket fence and a small yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, large windows, white picket fence, and front yard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the fenced yard and the plain side wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting multiple large windows and the simple, flat rear facade.
description_view_3: Right side view with the driveway, fence, and a mostly solid wall with limited window openings.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched double door with flanking lights, small steps, and minimal decorative elements
